notes: Section 184, R.S. § 263; acts , ; , ; , ; , , required printing of an annual report on commerce on navigation. See section 301 et seq. of Title 13, Census.Feb. 14, 1903, ch. 552, § 1032 Stat. 829Aug. 23, 1912, ch. 350, § 137 Stat. 407Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 141, § 137 Stat. 736Mar. 1, 1919, ch. 8640 Stat. 1256

Section 185, R.S. § 251 (part); acts , ; , , required Secretary of Commerce to prescribe forms of annual statements to be submitted to Congress showing the actual state of commerce and navigation between the United States and foreign countries, or coastwise between the collection districts of the United States. See section 301 et seq. of Title 13.Feb. 14, 1903, ch. 552, § 1032 Stat. 829Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 141, § 137 Stat. 736

Section 186, R.S. § 338, required annual report of statistics of commerce and navigation to state kinds, quantities, and value of merchandise entered and cleared coastwise into and from collection districts of the United States. See section 301 et seq. of Title 13.

Section 187, R.S. §§ 265, 3812; acts , ; , ; , , related to printing of statement of exports and imports. See section 301 et seq. of Title 13.Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 1728 Stat. 603Feb. 14, 1903, ch. 552, § 1032 Stat. 829Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 141, § 137 Stat. 736
